text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm up against my idol, King, in the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen. It's a sprint, unlike any
of my other races until now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In my mind, King is the closest Umamusume to
Princess Fighter... But I won't back down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to learn from her. I need to know what a
princess really is!
